title: Login authentication failure
description: User unable to log in despite correct credentials. Error 401 returned.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transactions failing intermittently during checkout process.

title: UI misalignment on dashboard
description: Widgets overlap on smaller screen resolutions.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: System fails to send email alerts after order confirmation.

title: Database performance degradation
description: Slow query execution observed during peak hours.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Reset links expire immediately after generation.

title: API returning incorrect data
description: Product API returns mismatched pricing information.

title: File upload size limitation error
description: Users unable to upload files larger than 5MB.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity.

title: Search functionality not filtering correctly
description: Search results ignore applied category filters.

title: Mobile responsiveness issue
description: Navigation menu not collapsing properly on mobile devices.

title: Data export CSV format incorrect
description: Exported CSV contains broken column alignment.

title: Server CPU usage spike
description: Unexpected CPU spike during batch processing.

title: Incorrect invoice calculation
description: Tax calculation inconsistent with configured rules.

title: Broken image links on homepage
description: Several product images fail to load due to 404 errors.
